steps.description: The student turns off their GoPro.
The student removes the SD card.
The student inserts a new SD card.
The student turns on their Go pro.
The student turns off their Go pro.
The student turns on their Go pro.
The student mounts the strap onto the Gopro.
The student screws the Gopro lock.
The student mounts the Go pro onto the tripod.
The student unscrews the lock screw on the tripod.
The student mounts the handheld grip.
The student removes their handheld grip.
